emails.subject: EnronOnline Cities
emails.body: EnronOnline Cities We trade the following cities on EnronOnline. In the US we trade the following cities: Boston New York Philadelphia Washington, DC Atlanta Cincinnati Chicago Little Rock Houston Phoenix Sacramento In Europe we trade: Stockholm Oslo Paris London In Asia we trade: Tokyo Osaka Hong Kong Sydney Melbourne
